name: ANNOUNCEMENT
description:
Hello y’all! :3

I hope you’ve all been doing alright!

I just came here to say I’m sorry for not posting in a while.

My motivation has been really low due to me being busy a lot these past few days. But also, I can’t seem to think of any ideas.

I know I have some request that I still plan on doing, but just creating the personality is hard for me rn 🥲

It’s like the part in my brain responsible for being creative or whatever just shut down lmao.

So it may take a while for me to post again. Or maybe my motivation will flow back in tomorrow- I really don’t know😭

I just wanted to inform y’all about why I’ve been so absent! Hopefully, I will soon be back with another bot for y’all to enjoy :)

...

Well. I hope y’all have a great morning/day or night! :D

Love you all <3
creator: ghoulett
